title: The Narrow Road to the Interior
description: Basho's masterpiece: a poetic pilgrimage through northern Japan, where every landscape holds a haiku.
introduction: Basho's masterpiece: a poetic pilgrimage through northern Japan, where every landscape holds a haiku.

translation.original_text: 月日は百代の過客にして、行かふ年も又旅人也。
translation.text: The months and days are travelers of eternity. The years that come and go are also voyagers.

translation.original_text: 閑さや岩にしみ入る蝉の声
translation.text: Stillness — the cicada's cry sinks into the rocks.
